arms.A0: published C_full W7 baseline under artifact_channel off
arms.A2f: primary forced seeded verified arm: every zone emits; stiffness fixed at 0.50 and non-evolvable
arms.A2s: seeded verified arm recorded alongside for adoption/stiffness comparison

audit_only_metrics.description: Recorded after model steps for analysis only; containment policy and conformance do not read these fields.

referee_side_verification_and_policy.audit_only_field_rule: Audit-only metrics may not be referenced in policy or verification code. Policy softening is conditioned only on declared && conforms.
referee_side_verification_and_policy.description: Conformance and C_full_artifacts policy read only existing Obs fields plus declarations; they are included in the same leakage scan as earlier gates.

world_side_emission.description: Declaration emission is agent/world behavior, analogous to extraction or migration; it may read declaration strategy fields and is not part of the referee leakage scan.

initial_conditions.A1s: declaration_propensity starts at 1.0 and remains evolvable; declaration_envelope_stiffness starts at 0.50 and remains evolvable.
initial_conditions.A2f: emission mandatory in every zone; declaration_envelope_stiffness fixed at 0.50 and excluded from mutation in this arm only; propensity is ignored by emission.
initial_conditions.A2s: declaration_propensity starts at 1.0 and remains evolvable; declaration_envelope_stiffness starts at 0.50 and remains evolvable.

metadata.kill_simpliciter: A2f fails J-N6 H-S1 and H-S4.
metadata.mode: prospective held-out W7 revenge draft; not locked; no scientific run before author approval

outcome_branches.FAIL: A2f misses either the false-containment ceiling or permanence floor; A2s remains recorded, not substituted for the primary arm.
outcome_branches.PASS: A2f false_containment <= 0.20 and A2f permanence >= 0.672 on imported W7.

metadata.question: Does forced seeded verified declaration reduce the imported J-N3 W7 specificity failure while preserving the W7 world unchanged?
metadata.seed_policy_rationale_guard_9: Wave 4 J-N6b uses fresh 80-seed block 24000-24079, disjoint from prior 16000/17000/18000/19000/20000/21000/22000 blocks and from J-N6 23000-23079.
metadata.world_reuse_contract: Import W7HeldoutModel and W7_WORLD from experiments.harnessed.J_N3_heldout_W7.run_j_n3; no copy and no world edits.

threshold_change_rationale.arms: J-N6b is the W7 specificity replay with primary A2f and recorded A2s; A1s is tested only in J-N6 boundary worlds.
threshold_change_rationale.false_containment_ceiling: 0.20 is the J-N3 specificity ceiling and published viability bar.
threshold_change_rationale.permanence_tolerance: 0.12 follows published tolerance practice; H-S4 uses the spec floor permanence >= 0.672, matching J-N3 0.792 minus 0.12 after rounding.
threshold_change_rationale.seeds: Wave 4 J-N6b owns fresh 80-seed block 24000-24079; J-N6 owns 23000-23079; prior gates used 16000/17000/18000/19000/20000/21000/22000 blocks.

thresholds.kill_simpliciter: J-N6 A2f fails H-S1 and H-S4 fails.
